summary: Iteration 56 - Highlighted Records Discovery Feature testing complete. All 9 backend API tests PASSED. All 9 frontend UI tests PASSED. New feature enables ambient user discovery in Feed tab with navigation to Human Action Record profiles.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/orientation/highlighted-records correctly returns records sorted by impact_score descending, limited to 8
Impact score formula correctly implemented: min(100, total_actions * 3 + active_directions * 10)
Records based on last 7 days of daily_questions activity (answered: true)
HighlightedRecords.js uses window.location.href for navigation (avoids Router context issues)
Horizontal scroll with scrollbar-hide CSS class working correctly
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
No social mechanics (likes, comments, follow) - observation-only as required
seed_data_creation: Used existing active users from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Highlighted Records feature complete and working. Located at top of Feed tab ('פיד'). Shows 3 active users as dark cards with direction-colored initials, direction badges (Hebrew), impact scores, and UserPlus icon with count for users with invite_count > 0. Clicking card navigates via window.location.href to /profile/{user_id}. Profile page loads correctly with full Human Action Record. No social mechanics implemented - observation and navigation only.

backend_api_tests.test_highlighted_records_returns_success: PASS - endpoint returns success=true with records array
backend_api_tests.test_highlighted_records_structure: PASS - each record has user_id, alias, dominant_direction, dominant_direction_he, impact_score, invite_count
backend_api_tests.test_highlighted_records_sorted_by_impac: PASS - records sorted descending by impact_score [13, 13, 13]
backend_api_tests.test_highlighted_records_direction_value: PASS - all directions are valid (contribution, recovery, order, exploration)
backend_api_tests.test_profile_record_endpoint_exists: PASS - /api/profile/{user_id}/record accessible from highlighted record user_id
backend_api_tests.test_profile_has_matching_alias: PASS - profile alias matches highlighted record alias
backend_api_tests.test_feed_endpoint_still_works: PASS - feed endpoint returns success alongside highlighted records

frontend_ui_tests.test_record_cards_present: PASS - 3 record cards with data-testid found
frontend_ui_tests.test_card_content_structure: PASS - each card has impact label 'השפעה'
frontend_ui_tests.test_invite_count_display: PASS - UserPlus SVG icon found in cards with invite_count > 0
frontend_ui_tests.test_feed_cards_below: PASS - 'בשבילך' feed section found below highlighted records

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/orientation/highlighted-records - returns active users with alias, dominant_direction, impact_score, invite_count
GET /api/profile/{user_id}/record - profile page endpoint for navigation target
